fetch_command: cd spikes/go-runtime-api-smoke && rtk proxy node - <<'NODE' # HTTP JSON-RPC POST to https://polkadot-asset-hub-rpc.polkadot.io for system_chain, chain_getRuntimeVersion, and state_getMetadata; writes state_getMetadata result.result verbatim plus newline to internal/metadatadecode/testdata/polkadot_asset_hub_runtime_metadata_v14.hex
